content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against origin/master, excluding .ralph-burning/ per the prompt. I read the changed test block in tests/cli.rs and the relevant CLI implementations in src/cli/milestone.rs, src/cli/task.rs, and src/cli/project.rs, then ran the added tests individually, ran cargo test --test cli for the full CLI integration suite, and ran br lint because .beads/issues.jsonl also changed. I did not run nix build. I did not find any correctness, safety, robustness, or significant maintainability issues in the submitted changes.

## Amendments

None.
